svg.content:
<mxfile host="app.diagrams.net" agent="Claude Code" version="24.0.0"><diagram id="easyeda-connection" name="EasyEDA接続構成"><mxGraphModel dx="800" dy="600" grid="1" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="1" page="1" pageScale="1" pageWidth="850" pageHeight="500" math="0" shadow="0"><root><mxCell id="0" /><mxCell id="1" parent="0" /><mxCell id="devc" value="Dev Container(VS Code)" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;verticalAlign=top;fontStyle=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;" vertex="1" parent="1"><mxGeometry x="20" y="20" width="320" height="260" as="geometry" /></mxCell><mxCell id="cc" value="Claude Code
(easyeda-api-skill / SKILL.md)" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#000000;" vertex="1" parent="1"><mxGeometry x="50" y="70" width="260" height="70" as="geometry" /></mxCell><mxCell id="br" value="Node.js ブリッジサーバー
(bridge-server.mjs)
localhost:49620" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#000000;" vertex="1" parent="1"><mxGeometry x="50" y="170" width="260" height="80" as="geometry" /></mxCell><mxCell id="eda" value="EasyEDA Pro デスクトップクライアント" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;verticalAlign=top;fontStyle=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;" vertex="1" parent="1"><mxGeometry x="440" y="20" width="320" height="260" as="geometry" /></mxCell><mxCell id="gw" value="run-api-gateway 拡張機能
(API Gateway)" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#000000;" vertex="1" parent="1"><mxGeometry x="470" y="170" width="260" height="80" as="geometry" /></mxCell><mxCell id="doc" value="回路図 / PCB" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#000000;" vertex="1" parent="1"><mxGeometry x="470" y="70" width="260" height="70" as="geometry" /></mxCell><mxCell id="e1" value="HTTP(curl)" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;html=1;" edge="1" parent="1" source="cc" target="br"><mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /></mxCell><mxCell id="e2" value="WebSocket" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;html=1;startArrow=classic;startFill=1;" edge="1" parent="1" source="br" target="gw"><mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /></mxCell><mxCell id="e3" value="API実行" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;html=1;" edge="1" parent="1" source="gw" target="doc"><mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /></mxCell></root></mxGraphModel></diagram></mxfile>

g.text: Node.js ブリッジサーバー
EasyEDA Pro デスクトップクライアント
